summary: Listener is in the home stretch of the June 23 Maryland primary. Top focus this week is the Council At-Large field — Laurie-Anne Sayles is the only incumbent, with eight-plus Democratic challengers. Secondary focus is sanctuary-framework stances of the at-large field and the Wootton High School relocation timeline. Listener also wants pre-political biographies of incumbents (Friedson, Glass, Jawando) and a clean read on the sanctuary-rollback question.
themes: Council At-Large 2026 field | Sayles is the only incumbent; field has eight-plus Democratic challengers
Sanctuary framework | Listener wants to know if any at-large candidate opposes the existing framework
Friedson fiscal frame | Whether Friedson is really the fiscal-restraint candidate when measured line-by-line
Wootton High School | MCPS closure/relocation timeline; capital-budget implications for council
Pre-political biographies | Listener flagged Friedson/Glass/Jawando origins as underserved
open_questions: Why is MCPS proposing to close/relocate Wootton High School and what happens next on the timeline?
Among the at-large Democrats, which one (if any) actually opposes the existing sanctuary framework?
Is Andrew Friedson actually the fiscal-restraint candidate when measured by individual line-item votes?
What is the new MCPS rating methodology and how is each Rockville school graded under it?
underserved_topics: Judicial branch races (Circuit Court Judge, Orphans Court)
Register of Wills / Clerk of Circuit Court
MoCo Board of Education candidates beyond at-large slate
Republican alternatives for the November general ballot (listener votes D primary but plans the general)
avoid_list: Thirty-X days out from the Maryland Democratic primary cold-open device (used 2026-05-16/17/18/19 ep1)
Montgomery County native framing hook (used heavily 2026-05-16 Friedson ep1)
My Seven Black Fathers / Reid Temple A.M.E. as memoir-anchor for anyone other than Jawando (used 2026-05-19 ep1)
Anniston Alabama / Donoho School / Vaughn Stewart Junior as mayor formative-experience device for anyone other than Vaughn Stewart (used 2026-05-20 ep1)
Born in Trenton / adopted as an infant from a teenage mom in a convent origin device for anyone other than Dawn Luedtke (used 2026-05-17 ep1)
First Muslim officer of the Montgomery County Police Department identity-formation device for anyone other than Sharif Hidayat (used 2026-05-18 ep1)
Pre-political biography is thinner in the public record / no Wikipedia entry adds independent verification (used 2026-05-16 ep1)
ICE Out Act / Trust Act / DHS officer screening bill as the immigration-record framing hook (used 2026-05-21 Glass ep3/ep4)
Run the buses, teach the kids, pick up the trash tagline (used 2026-05-21 Glass ep1/ep2/ep4)
S.M.A.R.T. Solutions framework as cold-open device (used 2026-05-27 Sayles ep4)
